en.title: Knowledge Points
en.prompt: In order to learn [subject] efficiently, please provide the core knowledge points of this field, covering the top 20% of importance. These key insights will enable me to develop a comprehensive understanding and solid foundation of 80% of the subject matter.
en.remark: Before diving into a particular subject, it is important to grasp its core knowledge points. Contributed by @ScenerorSun.

metaDescription: Learning fast? Get the top 20% most important knowledge points of any subject. Build a solid foundation quickly. Try it now.

faq.q: Does the AI's 20% core knowledge really cover 80% of scenarios?
faq.a: Roughly accurate, but "core" depends on the AI's training data emphasis. For obscure disciplines, also ask 3-5 field experts (Douban, Reddit discussions) for their core points and compare with the AI version. The intersection is the truly reliable core.

faq.q: Can I use it to quickly get into a new field?
faq.a: Great for the first week. Take the AI's core list, spend 1-2 hours expanding each, and in a week you've built basic understanding. After that read systematic textbooks. The AI's "80% coverage" falls far short for solving real problems.
